auth.title: Sign in to continue
auth.subtitle: Use your clinic account. Offline access is preserved after the first sign in.
auth.no_access_body: Your role does not have access to this section. Please contact your administrator.
auth.first_run_body: This account becomes the superadmin and unlocks the rest of the app.

setup.title: Connect to your clinic
setup.subtitle: Enter the URL of your sync server. You can change this later from settings.
setup.subtitle_v2: Enter the address of your clinic's sync server. You can change this later in settings.
setup.url_invalid: Failed to save sync server URL
setup.server_unreachable: Can't reach the sync server. Check the address and try again.
